subcodes.first_line: How can the praise of them that praise, the gratitude of them that render thanks, and the glorification of them that extol, be ascribed unto a station that [3.5s]... ...I swear by God! That which hath been destined for him who aideth My Cause excelleth the treasures of the earth
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد حامدین و شکر شاکرین و نعت ناعتین را چگونه میتوان بمقامی نسبت داد که از
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @martyrs and martyrdom, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @station of the Manifestation of God, @power of prayer, @spiritual transformation
